revision.text: #redirect[[en:辛]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

'''辛''' #（しん）[[辛味]]。辛いこと。 #（しん、かのと）十干の一つ。本項で詳述する。
---- {{十干}} '''辛'''（しん、かのと）は、[[十干]]の8番目である。[[陰陽五行説]]では[[金]]性の陰に割り当てられており、ここから日本では「かのと」（金の弟）ともいう。
辛の字は同音の「新」につながり、植物が枯れて新しい世代が生まれようとする状態として、8番目に宛てられた。
==辛を含む干支== *[[辛未]] *[[辛巳]] *[[辛卯]] *[[辛丑]] *[[辛亥]] *[[辛酉]]
{{stub}} [[Category:干支|かのと]]

'''辛''' #（しん）[[辛味]]。辛いこと。 #（しん、かのと）十干の一つ。本項で詳述する。
---- {{十干}} '''辛'''（しん、かのと）は、[[十干]]の8番目である。[[陰陽五行説]]では[[金]]性の陰に割り当てられており、ここから日本では「かのと」（金の弟）ともいう。
辛の字は同音の「新」につながり、植物が枯れて新しい世代が生まれようとする状態として、8番目に宛てられた。
[[中国語]]の[[化合物]]命名法では、[[オクタン]]、[[オクチル基]]など、[[炭素]]を8つ含む化合物や[[基|官能基]]の名に付けられる。ただし、[[ビタミン]]などの名称ではHの代わりに使われている。

revision.text:
{{Otheruses|十干の一つ|その他}}
{{十干十二支}} '''辛'''（しん、かのと）は、[[十干]]の8番目である。[[陰陽五行説]]では[[金]]性の陰に割り当てられており、ここから日本では「かのと」（金の弟）ともいう。
辛の字は同音の「新」につながり、植物が枯れて新しい世代が生まれようとする状態として、8番目に宛てられた。
[[西暦]]年の下一桁が1の年が辛の[[年]]となる。
[[中国語]]の[[化合物]]命名法では、[[オクタン]]、[[オクチル基]]など、[[炭素]]を8つ含む化合物や[[基|官能基]]の名に付けられる。
==辛を含む干支== {{Wiktionary|辛}} *[[辛未]] *[[辛巳]] *[[辛卯]] *[[辛丑]] *[[辛亥]] *[[辛酉]]
{{Culture-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:かのと}} [[Category:干支]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Sĭng (tiĕng-găng)]][[commons:Category:辛 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Xin (tige céleste)]][[gan:辛]][[hak:Sîn (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:辛]][[ko:신 (천간)]][[vi:Tân (Thiên can)]][[za:Sin (diengan)]][[zh_min_nan:Sin (Thian-kan)]][[zh_yue:辛 (天干)]][[zh:辛 (天干)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1078450]] Wikidata name: xīn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:23, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1078450]] Wikidata name: xīn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}}
'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|qq=|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|qq=|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|qq=|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|qq=|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|qq=|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Sĭng (tiĕng-găng)]][[sn:commons:Category:辛 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Xin (tige céleste)]][[gan:辛]][[hak:Sîn (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:辛]][[ko:신 (천간)]][[vi:Tân (Thiên can)]][[za:Sin (diengan)]][[zh-min-nan:Sin (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:辛 (天干)]][[zh:辛 (天干)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1078450]] Wikidata name: xīn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:23, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1078450]] Wikidata name: xīn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}}
'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}
{| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yin Metal Goat|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|zh|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|ko|신미|fr|Chèvre de métal|de|Metall-Schaf|en|Metal Goat|lt=辛未 (Yin Metal Goat)|lt_ko=신미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Snake|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|zh|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|ko|신사|fr|Serpent de métal|de|Metall-Schlange|en|Metal Snake|lt=辛巳 (Yin Metal Snake)|lt_ko=신사|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|zh|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|ko|신묘|fr|Lièvre de métal|de|Metall-Hase|en|Metal Rabbit|lt=辛卯 (Yin Metal Rabbit)|lt_ko=신묘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Ox|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|zh|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|ko|신축|fr|Buffle de métal|de|Metall-Büffel|en|Metal Ox|lt=辛丑 (Yin Metal Ox)|lt_ko=신축|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Pig|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|zh|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|ko|신해|fr|Cochon de métal|de|Metall-Schwein|en|Metal Pig|lt=辛亥 (Yin Metal Pig)|lt_ko=신해|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rooster|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|fr|Coq de métal|de|Metall-Hahn|en|Metal Rooster|lt=辛酉 (Yin Metal Rooster)|lt_ko=신유|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Sĭng (tiĕng-găng)]][[sn:commons:Category:辛 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Xin (tige céleste)]][[gan:辛]][[hak:Sîn (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:辛]][[ko:신 (천간)]][[vi:Tân (Thiên can)]][[za:Sin (diengan)]][[zh-min-nan:Sin (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:辛 (天干)]][[zh:辛 (天干)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1078450]] Wikidata name: xīn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:23, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1078450]] Wikidata name: xīn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}}
'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}
{| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yin Metal Goat|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|zh|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|ko|신미|fr|Chèvre de métal|de|Metall-Schaf|en|Metal Goat|lt=辛未 (Yin Metal Goat)|lt_ko=신미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Snake|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|zh|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|ko|신사|fr|Serpent de métal|de|Metall-Schlange|en|Metal Snake|lt=辛巳 (Yin Metal Snake)|lt_ko=신사|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|zh|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|ko|신묘|fr|Lièvre de métal|de|Metall-Hase|en|Metal Rabbit|lt=辛卯 (Yin Metal Rabbit)|lt_ko=신묘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Ox|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|zh|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|ko|신축|fr|Buffle de métal|de|Metall-Büffel|en|Metal Ox|lt=辛丑 (Yin Metal Ox)|lt_ko=신축|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Pig|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|zh|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|ko|신해|fr|Cochon de métal|de|Metall-Schwein|en|Metal Pig|lt=辛亥 (Yin Metal Pig)|lt_ko=신해|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rooster|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|fr|Coq de métal|de|Metall-Hahn|en|Metal Rooster|lt=辛酉 (Yin Metal Rooster)|lt_ko=신유|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Sĭng (tiĕng-găng)]][[sn:commons:Category:辛 (Heavenly Stem)]][[fr:Xin (tige céleste)]][[gan:辛]][[hak:Sîn (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:辛]][[ko:신 (천간)]][[vi:Tân (Thiên can)]][[za:Sin (diengan)]][[zh-min-nan:Sin (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:辛 (天干)]][[zh:辛 (天干)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1078450]] Wikidata name: xīn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:23, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1078450]] Wikidata name: xīn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}}
'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}

Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}

Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]].<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight [[:en:Carbon|carbon atoms]], such as [[:en:Octane|Octane]] and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

{| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yin Metal Goat|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|zh|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|ko|신미|fr|Chèvre de métal|de|Metall-Schaf|en|Metal Goat|lt=辛未 (Yin Metal Goat)|lt_ko=신미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Snake|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|zh|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|ko|신사|fr|Serpent de métal|de|Metall-Schlange|en|Metal Snake|lt=辛巳 (Yin Metal Snake)|lt_ko=신사|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|zh|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|ko|신묘|fr|Lièvre de métal|de|Metall-Hase|en|Metal Rabbit|lt=辛卯 (Yin Metal Rabbit)|lt_ko=신묘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Ox|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|zh|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|ko|신축|fr|Buffle de métal|de|Metall-Büffel|en|Metal Ox|lt=辛丑 (Yin Metal Ox)|lt_ko=신축|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Pig|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|zh|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|ko|신해|fr|Cochon de métal|de|Metall-Schwein|en|Metal Pig|lt=辛亥 (Yin Metal Pig)|lt_ko=신해|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rooster|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|fr|Coq de métal|de|Metall-Hahn|en|Metal Rooster|lt=辛酉 (Yin Metal Rooster)|lt_ko=신유|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}.<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}
{| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yin Metal Goat|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|zh|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|ko|신미|fr|Chèvre de métal|de|Metall-Schaf|en|Metal Goat|lt=辛未 (Yin Metal Goat)|lt_ko=신미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Snake|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|zh|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|ko|신사|fr|Serpent de métal|de|Metall-Schlange|en|Metal Snake|lt=辛巳 (Yin Metal Snake)|lt_ko=신사|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|zh|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|ko|신묘|fr|Lièvre de métal|de|Metall-Hase|en|Metal Rabbit|lt=辛卯 (Yin Metal Rabbit)|lt_ko=신묘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Ox|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|zh|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|ko|신축|fr|Buffle de métal|de|Metall-Büffel|en|Metal Ox|lt=辛丑 (Yin Metal Ox)|lt_ko=신축|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Pig|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|zh|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|ko|신해|fr|Cochon de métal|de|Metall-Schwein|en|Metal Pig|lt=辛亥 (Yin Metal Pig)|lt_ko=신해|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rooster|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|fr|Coq de métal|de|Metall-Hahn|en|Metal Rooster|lt=辛酉 (Yin Metal Rooster)|lt_ko=신유|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}

Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

{{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}}
'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}.<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}
{| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yin Metal Goat|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|zh|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|ko|신미|fr|Chèvre de métal|de|Metall-Schaf|en|Metal Goat|lt=辛未 (Yin Metal Goat)|lt_ko=신미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Snake|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|zh|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|ko|신사|fr|Serpent de métal|de|Metall-Schlange|en|Metal Snake|lt=辛巳 (Yin Metal Snake)|lt_ko=신사|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|zh|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|ko|신묘|fr|Lièvre de métal|de|Metall-Hase|en|Metal Rabbit|lt=辛卯 (Yin Metal Rabbit)|lt_ko=신묘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Ox|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|zh|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|ko|신축|fr|Buffle de métal|de|Metall-Büffel|en|Metal Ox|lt=辛丑 (Yin Metal Ox)|lt_ko=신축|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Pig|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|zh|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|ko|신해|fr|Cochon de métal|de|Metall-Schwein|en|Metal Pig|lt=辛亥 (Yin Metal Pig)|lt_ko=신해|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Metal Rooster|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|fr|Coq de métal|de|Metall-Hahn|en|Metal Rooster|lt=辛酉 (Yin Metal Rooster)|lt_ko=신유|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}

Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

{{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}}
'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}.<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=rebus character|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=重光|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}

== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=Loangraph|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=Q11644697|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms|1=Carbon}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane|1=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}.<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=Loangraph|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=Q11644697|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms|1=Carbon}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane|1=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=Q11644697|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms|1=Carbon}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane|1=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}.<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=Loangraph|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=Q11644697|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms|1=Carbon}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane|1=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).

{{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}}
'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}.<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=Loangraph|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=Q11644697|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|WD=Q623|lt=carbon atoms|1=Carbon}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|WD=Q150681|lt=Octane|1=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}

== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=Loangraph|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=Q11644697|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|qid=Q623|lt=carbon atoms|1=Carbon}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|qid=Q150681|lt=Octane|1=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
==Sexagenary cycles containing Kanoto (辛)== {{Wiktionary|辛}}

{{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}}
'''Kanoto''' (辛, kanoto) is the 8th of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}.<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=b9acbea8f83e27ae0c68a195cdb688ae8b48eddc1dd0e41d7f1001021b5a674aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Kanoto+(%e8%be%9b)&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjAwMg&ntb=1</ref>
== Pronunciations: 辛 (Stem 8) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Xīn * Korean: Sin (신) * Vietnamese: Tân * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Shin (しん) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Kanoto (かのと, 金の弟 – “Younger Metal”)
== Overview == * The origin of the character "辛" has been subject to various proposals, but no definitive theory exists. Its usage to denote the eighth position in the Ten Heavenly Stems is through {{ill|Jia Jie|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Jie|1=Loangraph|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in the digit 1 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} correspond to the year of Xin. Additionally, the alternate name for the year is '''Chongguang''' ({{ill|重光|ja|重光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/重光|1=Q11644697|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644697}})<ref>{{Cite web |title=Dictionary View [重光 : ㄔㄨㄥˋ ㄍㄨㄤ] |url=https://dict.revised.moe.edu.tw/dictView.jsp?ID=126821&la=0&powerMode=0 |website=Ministry of Education Revised Chinese Dictionary 2021 |access-date=2024-03-08 |language=zh-Hant-TW|qq=}}</ref>. * In {{ill|Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinese chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20826683}}, the term "Xin" is used in the names of compounds or functional groups containing eight {{ill|Carbon|en|Carbon|qid=Q623|lt=carbon atoms|1=Carbon}}, such as {{ill|Octane|en|Octane|qid=Q150681|lt=Octane|1=Octane}} and {{ill|Octyl group|ja|オクチル基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octyl group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} (hinoe). * The {{ill|lucky direction|ja|恵方|3=歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|lt=Lucky direction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lucky direction|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歳徳神}} associated with Xin is slightly south of south-southeast (165 degrees).
